code:
import io
import string

mut total = 0
mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    done = true
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          i = i + 1
        else
          i = n + 1
        end
      when None
        i = n
      end
    end
    if i == n + 1
      mut start = i - 1
      while start < n
        match string.byte_at(line, start)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9
            start = n + 2
          else
            start = start + 1
          end
        when None
          start = n
        end
      end
      let first_end = if start >= n + 2
        start - 2
      else
        start
      end
      mut j = first_end
      while j < n
        match string.byte_at(line, j)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9
            j = j + 1
          else
            j = n + 1
          end
        when None
          j = n
        end
      end
      if j == n + 1
        let tok_start = j - 1
        mut k = tok_start
        while k < n
          match string.byte_at(line, k)
          when Some(b)
            if b == 32 or b == 9
              k = n + 1
            else
              k = k + 1
            end
          when None
            k = n
          end
        end
        let tok_end = if k == n + 1
          k - 1
        else
          k
        end
        let token = string.substring(line, tok_start, tok_end)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          total = total + v
        when None
          total = total
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
println("sum=#{total}")
